payload.answer: I found a conflict: Sara is currently remembered as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify which relationship should be kept, or whether both are true in a specific context.
citations: Existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
New input: Sara is my niece.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to Sara, who appears to be the same person as the existing Sara, but the relationship conflicts with the current stored relationship.

details: No durable memory was committed because the new input conflicts with an existing relationship.

repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Record both with clarification, e.g. Sara is my daughter and also my niece by marriage/adoption/family context.
Mark the relationship as uncertain until clarified.
